content_body:
Gary - just in case you don't get the little form that I filled out - wanted to let you know that we gave the cabin and our stay there 5 out of 5 stars in all categories!

Thank you so much for helping us have a great time!

By the way, do you know of any good real estate agents in the area? We are thinking about buying a small cabin (nothing as lovely as the Rolling River).

Thanks again for everything!
title: Moving to the North GA Mountains
